title: Regex compiled on every call in sanitize_css_for_style_tag and theme.rs
description: activitypub.rs sanitize_css_for_style_tag (line 207) and theme.rs load_theme_css (line 85) both compile a regex on every invocation: Regex::new(r"(?i)</\s*style"). These are called on every page render (profile, post, index pages). The regex is identical in both locations. Fix: use a static LazyLock<Regex> like the rest of the codebase already does (see cards.rs URL_RE, META_RE for the pattern).
